title: Digital Marketing Manager Vacancy at GKB Opticals - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Digital Marketing Manager Vacancy at GKB Opticals - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
Join the GKB Opticals family as a Digital Marketing Manager in Chennai. We believe in empowering our employees with the tools, training, and environment they need to succeed.

About GKB Opticals:
GKB Opticals is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Optimize product pages for search visibility and conversion
• Execute digital marketing campaigns across Google, Meta, and other channels
• Manage email marketing campaigns and push notifications
• Build and maintain affiliate and influencer marketing programs
• Conduct competitor analysis and market benchmarking
• Manage customer reviews, ratings, and return/refund processes
• Manage marketplace relationships with Amazon, Flipkart, and Meesho

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Ed / M.Ed from a recognized institution
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Affiliate Marketing
• Proficiency in Supply Chain
• Proficiency in Facebook Ads
• Proficiency in Customer Segmentation
• Proficiency in Magento
• Proficiency in Digital Marketing
• Proficiency in CRM Software
• Proficiency in Product Management

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Annual performance appraisal
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Chennai, Tamil Nadu, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with GKB Opticals!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: B.Ed / M.Ed from a recognized institution
